name: Chili Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave Frankfurters uncovered on high (100%) until warm, about 30 to 45 seconds.
2. Place one Frankfurter in each bun on a serving plate; spoon chili onto the Frankfurters.
3. Microwave uncovered until chili is hot, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
4. If preparing just one Chili Dog, microwave uncovered for 30 to 45 seconds.
5. To make Coney Dogs, sprinkle fresh chopped onion on the top of the heated chili before serving.
